title: 9 · HL WS · api vs api-ui compare

panels.title: ${coin} — bid / ask · api.hyperliquid.xyz vs api-ui.hyperliquid.xyz
panels.description: Both endpoints' best bid/ask overlaid. Check whether one consistently leads or has staler quotes.

targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp time, bid_price api_bid, ask_price api_ask FROM hyperliquid_bookticker WHERE symbol='${coin}' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, bid_price ui_bid, ask_price ui_ask FROM hyperliquid_ui_bookticker WHERE symbol='${coin}' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) ORDER BY timestamp

panels.title: ${coin} — per-quote delivery lag (ms) · positive = api received first / ui slower
panels.description: For each unique (bid,ask) tuple seen on both feeds in the window, lag = ui.first_recv_ts − api.first_recv_ts (ms, local clocks). Same gate1 host so OS clock is shared. Positive ⇒ api saw it first; negative ⇒ api-ui saw it first.

targets.rawSql: WITH a AS (SELECT bid_price b, ask_price k, min(recv_ts_ns) t_a FROM hyperliquid_bookticker WHERE symbol='${coin}' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND recv_ts_ns IS NOT NULL GROUP BY bid_price, ask_price), u AS (SELECT bid_price b, ask_price k, min(recv_ts_ns) t_u FROM hyperliquid_ui_bookticker WHERE symbol='${coin}' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND recv_ts_ns IS NOT NULL GROUP BY bid_price, ask_price) SELECT cast(a.t_a / 1000 as timestamp) time, (u.t_u - a.t_a) / 1000000.0 lag_ms FROM a INNER JOIN u ON a.b=u.b AND a.k=u.k ORDER BY time

panels.title: ${coin} — lag stats (window aggregate)
panels.description: Aggregate lag stats over the visible window. Mean ≪ 0 ⇒ api-ui is consistently faster. % api_first ⇒ share of unique quotes where api received first.

targets.rawSql: WITH a AS (SELECT bid_price b, ask_price k, min(recv_ts_ns) t_a FROM hyperliquid_bookticker WHERE symbol='${coin}' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND recv_ts_ns IS NOT NULL GROUP BY bid_price, ask_price), u AS (SELECT bid_price b, ask_price k, min(recv_ts_ns) t_u FROM hyperliquid_ui_bookticker WHERE symbol='${coin}' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND recv_ts_ns IS NOT NULL GROUP BY bid_price, ask_price), j AS (SELECT (u.t_u - a.t_a) / 1000000.0 lag_ms FROM a INNER JOIN u ON a.b=u.b AND a.k=u.k) SELECT count() n_quotes, round(avg(lag_ms),2) mean_ms, round(min(lag_ms),2) min_ms, round(max(lag_ms),2) max_ms, round(avg(case when lag_ms>0 then 1.0 else 0.0 end)*100,1) pct_api_first FROM j

panels.title: ${coin} — update rate (rows/s) per endpoint
panels.description: How often each endpoint publishes a quote update. Big gap = one feed is slower / coalesces updates.

targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp time, count() api FROM hyperliquid_bookticker WHERE symbol='${coin}' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY 1s ORDER BY timestamp
SELECT timestamp time, count() ui FROM hyperliquid_ui_bookticker WHERE symbol='${coin}' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY 1s ORDER BY timestamp

panels.title: ${coin} — spread (bp) per endpoint
panels.description: (ask−bid)/mid · 1e4 sampled at 100ms. Compare quoted spread; api-ui sometimes offers tighter book.

targets.rawSql: SELECT timestamp time, (last(ask_price)-last(bid_price))/((last(ask_price)+last(bid_price))/2.0) * 10000 api_sp_bp FROM hyperliquid_bookticker WHERE symbol='${coin}' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY 100T ORDER BY timestamp

SELECT timestamp time, (last(ask_price)-last(bid_price))/((last(ask_price)+last(bid_price))/2.0) * 10000 ui_sp_bp FROM hyperliquid_ui_bookticker WHERE symbol='${coin}' AND $__timeFilter(timestamp) SAMPLE BY 100T ORDER BY timestamp
